title: Pub dependency resolution and constraints
description: Pub resolves version constraints into pubspec.lock; apps commit the lock while packages do not, and SDK constraints gate compatibility.
body: Use when managing Flutter/Dart dependencies. pubspec.yaml declares dependencies with version constraints (caret ^ allows compatible updates) plus a Dart/Flutter SDK constraint; flutter pub get resolves them into pubspec.lock, which records exact versions. An application commits pubspec.lock so every build uses identical versions, while a reusable package omits it so consumers resolve fresh. dev_dependencies are excluded from the published package, and dependency_overrides force a version (use sparingly). Do not run an app build that re-resolves to untested versions or ignore SDK-constraint conflicts. Actions: commit the lock for apps, set realistic SDK constraints. Validation signals include a clean flutter pub get reproducing the lock. Risk boundary: an uncommitted lock for an app means production builds may pull different package versions than were tested.
